series_description: Invoice sent to the Court of Common Pleas upon appeal of an LCC case denoting the cost of the transcript.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by the Auditor of State, and audit report is released

series_description: Claims and Litigation Records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed

series_description: Written notice from LCC to all affected government office relative to receipt of a notice of appeal.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals and

series_description: An index outlining the case number and permit holder for each citation and the hearing date.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 years or until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals of all cases listed in the Docket, whichever occurs last, and

series_description: An index of those permits voluntarily cancelled by the permit holder.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 years and

series_description: Notice generated by the Attorney General notifying LCC that permitholder has fully paid delinquent sales takes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until file is destroyed

series_description: An index of the case number, permit applicant statistics, permit type applied for, and number if appeal is from a renewal denial, and reason for appeal, and a chronological record of the case.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 years or until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals of all cases listed on the Docket, whichever occurs last, and

series_description: Allows state agencies to establish or increase appropriation authority in special funds.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Correspondence of the head of an agency dealing with significant aspects of the administration of their offices. Correspondence includes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: List of all positions within an agency by position control number, including both filled and vacant positions. Used for budget and personnel purposes.
retention_statement: Paper: DAS to retain 3 years; all other agencies retain until superseded by a new roster

series_description: Includes exhibits, movies, and videotape productions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until information is no longer current

series_description: Record generated by LCC dismissing pending revocation action against permit holder due to full payment of all delinquent taxes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals, and

series_description: Index of all cases appealed from the denial of a liquor permit application by the Division of Liquor Control.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 years or until final disposition of all cases listed on the Docket, whichever occurs last, and

series_description: An index of the case number, docket number, permit holder statistics, permit type and number, a synopsis of the charge for each case brought before the LCC, and a chronological record of the case.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 5 years or until final dispositionof all legal actions and appeals of all cases listed in the Docket, whichever occurs last, and

series_title: Postal Records, Registered Mail, Insured Mail Logs
series_description: Postal Records, Registered Mail, Insured Mail Logs, and Metered Records.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Original computer printout, instructions and work sheets used to complete equipment inventory reports for pagers, laptops, cellular phones, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded

series_description: Contract Encumbrances, Procurements, Complaints to Vendors and Related Contract Documents.
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years after contract expires

series_description: An index listing the case number and permit holder for each sales tax case docketed for hearing.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in single volume until all cases listed on docket have exhausted all legal actions and appeal, or for 5 years, whichever is longer, and

series_description: Requests by LCC to have minor's license revoked due to violation involving liquor laws.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals, and

series_description: Forms, letters and other evidence used or considered during a citation or appeal hearing.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals, and

series_description: LCC generated voluntary cancellation by the permit holder of a permit.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain with cancellation log for 5 years and

series_description: Record from the Division of Liquor Control rejecting the issuance of renewal of a permit.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals and

series_description: A log indicating the times in and out for reporters used at LCC hearings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until records audited by Auditor of State and report is issued

series_description: Bill for goods shipped or services rendered. They are matched with purchase orders and receiving reports, and attached to vouchers for payment.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Instructions issued by the Governor as the Chief Executive of State Government (originals on file permanently with Secretary of State).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Also includes other published periodic reports on agency activities.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Destroy excess copies when no longer of administrative value

series_description: Includes news/press releases and bulletins issued by an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in agency until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Executive Budget Proposal
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until the end of biennium

series_description: Form used to certify the destruction or transfer of records according to approved retention schedules.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Includes published reports, unpublished substantive reports and policy studies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Reports created by state agency staff or outside consultants concerning the management or operations of a state agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Payroll Warrant Records and Payroll Disbursement Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: The decidion of the LCC setting forth the violation charged and penalty assessed.

retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals and

retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals, and

series_description: A determination by the LCC relative to suspending or revoking a permit due to delinquent tax payments to the State of Ohio.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain with case file until final disposition of all legal actions and

series_description: Includes mailing lists, directories, rosters, and registers compiled by an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Formal opinions and informal opinions issued to state agencies with all pertinent materials attached.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative or legal value to agency

series_description: Postal Reports and Stamp Requisitions
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Timesheets, leave requests, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Direct Purchase Orders, Requisitions and Other Doc
series_description: Direct Purchase Orders, Requisitions and Other Documents Related to Purchase of Goods or Services.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released, and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Proposed and final copies of all rules and regulations promulgated through the LCC.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain proposed rules for 2 years and

series_description: Hearings held 4 times annually at which the public can express concerns or ask questions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until last business day of year in which meeting was held

series_description: Referral letters, requests for routine information or publications provided to the public by an agency which are answered by standard form letters.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months

series_description: Copies of state and federal legislation of interest to an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of use

series_description: To request Controlling Board approval of emergency expenditures for Capital Improvement Projects, purchase made without competitive selection, and trnasfer of Capital Improvement Funds.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Copies of all pleadings, journal entries, dockets and paper or written exhibits, records, reports, documents and a list of non-paper evidence for each LCC case appealed to the Court of Common Pleas. In accordnace with
retention_statement: Paper: Consolidate with all related files into a single case file. Retain until final disposition of all legal actions and appeals and

series_description: Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos); also, correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations and other miscellaneous inquires. This correspondence in informatve (it does not attempt to influence agency policy).
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year

series_description: Includes worksheets and information used to draft rules, JCARR proceedings, and transcripts of public hearings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year after rule published

series_description: Publications produced by an agency detailing operations, regulations, and/or procedures of an agency.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until supserseded, obsolete or replaced

series_description: Audit reports and work papers created by an agency's internal audit unit or similar functioning unit.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistributio
series_description: Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source and to hold unknown revenue source and to hold unknown receipts for redistribution. Also used by agencies which have established a departmental holding fund from which revenue is redistributed or by any agency which receives revenue from an unknown source and deposits it to a fund using the revenue source hold.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released abd all discrepancies are resolved
